productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Wild Cats Cycle Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% organic cotton,  tape detailing on the in-seam of a softly ribbed neckline, brand tab appliqued on the left hem, and logo painted on the back of the neckFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash dark colors separately Wash inside out Do not bleach Tumble dry normal, low heat Do not iron trim or decoration Warm iron when needed Do not dry clean If you are a New Hampshire Wild cat or have any connection with one, especially with the cycling team, you ought to have this grey tee from timberland in your wardrobe. Show off you love for this great American University as you look absolutely cool and amazing! Team it with jeans or shorts for an incredible look.This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner with an aim to reduce Carbon Footprint.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
